Lukas Nilsson

"Based on everything you know about me, who am I in one sentence"

ChatGPT — "You are a visionary builder—philosopher, artist, and teacher—who uses story, technology, and disciplined optimism to inspire human agency and meaning by revealing the beauty in the world."
